meta.title: The insane aircraft America *almost* bought (Part 1)
meta.description:
Let's dive into Part 1 of this "iceberg" dedicated to the aircraft that the US military funded or could have put into service. Part 2 will drop next week! 

You can find the full iceberg article this video is based on here:
https://www.sandboxx.us/news/the-military-aircraft-america-almost-bought-iceberg/

You can find more Iceberg charts about just about everything here:
https://www.reddit.com/r/IcebergCharts/
